templates.body:
Weekly ops review · [week_of] · variant: [variant]
Timer: 15 min. Phone face-down. One sheet only.

INBOX (3 min)
[ ] Past SLA reply? Name: ___ Action: ___
[ ] Complaint tone? → mf-tpl-001 yes/no
[ ] One follow-up today: ___
Ignore: promos, newsletters

MONEY (3 min)
[ ] Bank vs 7-day bills: ok / tight / investigate
[ ] Overdue owed to us: ___
[ ] Overdue we owe: ___
[ ] Surprise charge: ___
Ignore: full P&L, new SaaS

JOBS (4 min)
Ships this week (max 3): 1) ___ 2) ___ 3) ___
[ ] Scope creep unpaid? → mf-tool-003
Stuck job: ___ Unblock: ___
Ignore: future product ideas

PEOPLE (3 min)
[ ] Waiting on my yes/no: ___
[ ] Coverage gap 7 days: ___
[ ] Thank-you or correction: ___
Ignore: reorg daydreams

CLOSE (2 min)
One fix next week: ___
Ignore on purpose: ___
Next review: [date] calendar set
Log row written: Y/N

PARKED (not this week)
- ___
- ___
Review next Friday. Do not start today.

SOLO WEEKLY (15 min)
Inbox 3 · Money 3 · Jobs 5 · Close 4
No people block. You are the people.

FIRE WEEK (6 min max)
Inbox SLA + complaint check only.
Money: tight or ok?
Full ritual resumes when fire out.
